name: proxcenter-ui
desc: ProxCenter is an alternative to VMware vCenter for Proxmox environments. It provides a modern, intuitive web interface to manage multiple Proxmox VE clusters a…
descFull: ProxCenter is an alternative to VMware vCenter for Proxmox environments. It provides a modern, intuitive web interface to manage multiple Proxmox VE clusters and Proxmox Backup Server instances from a single pane of glass.
